page_title: Business visitors: Attend conferences, events and meetings in Canada - Canada.ca
h1: Business visitors: Attend conferences, events and meetings in Canada

sections.heading: Business visitor
items: Find out if you qualify as a business visitor, if you need a visa or an electronic travel authorization, about letters of invitation and other documents you may need, and how to plan for your visit to Canada

sections.heading: Canadian business or event organizer
items: Find out how to bring business guests to Canada, how to register your event with us, how to prepare a letter of invitation, what you need to know about protocol and border requirements, and more

sections.heading: Before you arrive
items: Find out what you can bring to Canada when you cross the border.
